meaning: n.无边便帽,并头草属的植物
examples: It's like a skullcap and looks so awkward.
To pick up brain activity, the skullcap is covered in electroencephalographic (EEG) electrodes.
Investigate the benefits of chamomile, valerian, kava, passionflower, skullcap, catnip, or hops.
Nobody in the neighborhood had a beard or dressed in the antiquated Old World style or wore a skullcap either outdoors or in the houses I routinely floated through with my boyhood friends.
He wore a dishdash and a white skullcap.
